subcodes.first_line: The Great Announcement proclaimeth: O people of God! Make not yourselves to be afflicted after the manner of the Shi'ih, and from the lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نبا عظیم میفرماید یا حزب الله بمثابه شیعه خود را مبتلا منمائید و از انوار
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @Word of God the cause of creation
